face.structure: Oval face with defined jawline and slightly prominent cheekbones, hinting at a thoughtful and introspective persona

eyes.shape: Sharp almond shape, evoking a sense of keen observation
eyes.color: Deep hazel with subtle green flecks
details: Bright highlights towards the outer edge
eyes.expression_effect: Slight furrowed brows to indicate concentration

face.expression: A contemplative look, with lips slightly pursed as if in thought

skin.undertone: Olive undertones providing a natural warmth
skin.texture: Smooth and youthful with a soft matte finish
skin.rendering_notes: Subtle gradient shading for depth with minimal gloss on the cheeks

hair.style: Short in the back with longer textured layers on top
hair.flow: Gently tousled with natural waves that frame the forehead
details: Subtle shine along the front layers

character.aura: A faint halo of analytical calm, with subtle energetic sparks denoting sporadic confidence

outfit.base: Smart casual ensemble with a strategic flair
outfit.design: Tailored blazer with minimalist patterns over a fitted high-neck shirt
details: Silver cufflinks with a minimalist design
outfit.fit: Tailored and fitted, emphasizing a tall and slender physique

composition.framing: Medium shot from the waist up to capture facial details and upper body posture
composition.pose: Standing slightly turned as if assessing a situation, one hand thoughtfully reaching towards the chin
composition.gesture: Gentle tilt of the head suggesting deep thought

background.type: Abstract with hints of strategic complexity
background.color_palette: Cool tones of blue and grey with intermittent geometric shapes
background.details: Subtle blueprint-like lines and circles indicating strategic themes
background.rules: Background elements should not overpower but complement the character, keeping focus on Jinwoo
